settings.title: Client ID
settings.desc: Your Spotify app Client ID from developer.spotify.com/dashboard

settings.title: Client Secret
settings.desc: Your Spotify app Client Secret from developer.spotify.com/dashboard

settings.title: Redirect URI
settings.desc: Must exactly match a Redirect URI set in your Spotify app. Use http://<pi-ip>:8989/spotify/callback where <pi-ip> is your Pi's IP address.

settings.title: Refresh Token
settings.desc: Stored automatically after you authorize. Clear this value to trigger re-authorization.
